meaning: n.坦噶尼喀(坦桑尼亚的一部分,在非洲东部),坦噶尼喀湖
examples: Tanzania is a union of the states of Tanganyika and Zanzibar.
In 1960 there were forests fringing the 300-mile shoreline of Lake Tanganyika and extending for miles.
In 1919 Britain was awarded the former German territory of Tanganyika as a League of Natio mandate.
In between chimp tracking expeditions, Lake Tanganyika beckons for snorkelling, kayaking and hippo- and crocodile-spotting forays.
In 1964, Tanganyika, Zanzibar and Pemba joined to form the United Republic of Tanganyika and Zanzibar.
